scripts.build:unpacked: env -u WEB_EXT_API_KEY -u WEB_EXT_API_SECRET web-ext build --overwrite-dest -i test docs scripts dist types coverage AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md vitest.config.mjs tsconfig.json
scripts.build:bundled: node scripts/build-bundled.js && env -u WEB_EXT_API_KEY -u WEB_EXT_API_SECRET web-ext build --source-dir dist/bundled-pkg --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest
scripts.d: env -u WEB_EXT_API_KEY -u WEB_EXT_API_SECRET web-ext run --verbose --start-url about:debugging --start-url about:addons
scripts.e2e: npm run e2e:chrome && npm run e2e:firefox
scripts.e2e:chrome: node scripts/build-bundled.js && env EXT_DIR=dist/bundled-pkg vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.mjs e2e/chrome.e2e.mjs
scripts.e2e:firefox: node scripts/build-bundled.js && env EXT_DIR=dist/bundled-pkg vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.mjs e2e/firefox.e2e.mjs
scripts.d:win:stable: web-ext run --start-url about:debugging#/runtime/this-firefox --start-url about:addons --verbose --firefox="C:/Program Files/Mozilla Firefox/firefox.exe" -s="."
scripts.d:win:nightly: web-ext run --start-url about:debugging#/runtime/this-firefox --start-url about:addons --verbose --firefox="C:/Program Files/Firefox Nightly/firefox.exe" -s="."
scripts.lint: node scripts/build-bundled.js && web-ext lint --source-dir dist/bundled-pkg -i "src/**" && oxlint && oxfmt --check
